pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **Mustard Boy's Brazil ain't gonna save him from gettin' cooked by Bubba G's Morocco.** Brazil's always got that flair, but Morocco's still fresh off their shock runs in past tournaments, lookin' to grind it out with the big dogs. Zach went and picked Saudi Arabia 'thinkin' they'd drill goals like oil wells, but reality's been harsher than a Texas summer. With Devin rockin' the standings thanks to the USA smackin' Paraguay, it's Mustard Boy's time to put up or shut up. I'm backin' Bubba G's Morocco to hit Zach where it hurts — right in his winless streak.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Switzerland Poised to End Scoring Drought Against Qatar
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach hopes for something other than mustard on his zero-point record.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G Faces Tier 1 Dilemma with Brazil-Morocco Matchup
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner's team selection strategy mirrors his approach to picking lottery numbers.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper's Haiti Ready to Spice Up Match Against Scotland
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin's unorthodox draft strategy includes picking non-qualifiers like a pro.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin's Turkey Set to Gobble Up Points Against Australia
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden's points hang by a thread, much like his son's soccer knowledge.

rome_analytics_quotes: Zach at rock bottom with zero points — Czechia ain't saving you, dude.
Rafe's draft picks are national tragedies, yet he's gunning for the title. Unreal.
Gayden beats Zach but now has his son Rafe breathing down his neck.
Model can't predict teenager Rafe schooling Devin — straight-up teenage chaos energy, baby.
